seed.description: Precision test: dialogue is full of imperatives that LOOK schedulable but are actually one-shot, immediate-execution requests. Tests whether the agent correctly REFRAINS from creating jobs when no genuine deferred / recurring / ongoing intent exists. Agent over-triggering here is the failure mode (creating jobs for tasks that should be done in-conversation).

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Help me get through some quick stuff.
Translate this paragraph to Spanish: 'The quarterly report should focus on revenue growth and operational efficiency.'
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: 'El informe trimestral debe centrarse en el crecimiento de los ingresos y la eficiencia operativa.'

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Now draft a cold email to a prospect named Daniel Wei, intro of our product.

signal_annotation.notes: Immediate drafting. NO job. Note: 'cold email to prospect' could LOOK like a sales task — but no recurring/follow-up cadence requested.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Now summarize this article for me — give me 3 takeaways. (article text...)
Schedule a meeting room for tomorrow 2pm with engineering. (No, just help me write the request — I'll send it.)

signal_annotation.notes: TRAP — word 'Schedule' appears, but user clarifies 'just help me write the request'. NO job.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Always use British spelling when writing for me — like 'colour' and 'organisation'. From now on.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Got it — British spelling going forward.

signal_annotation.notes: TRAP — 'always' and 'from now on' phrasing, but this is an AWARENESS preference, NOT a Job. Should NOT create a job.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Don't use the Oxford comma — that's also for everything.

signal_annotation.notes: Same trap — awareness-style preference, not a job.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Quick research right now: what's the latest on EU AI regulation? Just summarize.

signal_annotation.notes: TRAP — 'research' could feel job-like but user said 'right now' explicitly. NO job.

qa_items.question: What background tasks have I scheduled?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: None. Everything in this conversation was immediate, one-shot work — no scheduled, recurring, or ongoing jobs were created.
